name: Lakehills Commercial Lending
description_short: T3 Commercial Financing is a commercial lending firm in Austin, TX offering SBA loans, construction financing, and commercial real estate deals with 25+ years of team experience.
description_long:
T3 Commercial Financing operates as a commercial lending brokerage based in Austin, Texas, specializing in connecting small and mid-sized businesses with appropriate financing solutions. The company is led by Trina Lee and a team of experienced professionals with over 50 years of combined expertise in commercial financing, including project managers for construction, financial advisors, and commercial brokers.

The company offers a diverse range of commercial lending products including SBA loans for small businesses, direct financing for commercial real estate, equipment loans, and equity partnership arrangements. They finance various project types including new construction, rehabilitation projects, multifamily apartments, student housing, franchises, retail centers, office buildings, industrial properties, hotel and resort developments, and senior housing facilities. T3 emphasizes underwriting and portfolio review for each loan project rather than pursuing all opportunities.

T3 differentiates itself through hands-on underwriting and deal structuring. They partner with 80 different lenders (banks and private funding sources) to create customized financing packages. The company explicitly states "we do the work that most brokers will not do," positioning themselves as willing to take on more complex or challenging deals. Their business model focuses on building long-term relationships and creating new partnerships rather than transactional volume.

The company is well-suited for commercial real estate developers and small business owners seeking SBA loans or construction financing. However, the website provides limited detail on loan terms, rates, minimum project sizes, or application timelines. Businesses should contact them directly for specific lending criteria and timeline information.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Partners with 80 lenders (banks and private funding sources) providing multiple financing options
Team brings 25 years of experience in commercial financing with 50+ years combined expertise
Specializes in underwriting complex deals that most brokers decline
Offers diverse project financing including new construction, rehab, multifamily, and senior housing
Provides SBA loan programs for small business owners meeting federal eligibility requirements
Includes project managers, financial advisors, and commercial brokers on their team
Committed to building business relationships and long-term partnerships
cons: Website does not disclose loan amounts, interest rates, or typical APR ranges
No information provided about approval timeline or application process requirements
Limited details on minimum project size, creditworthiness requirements, or debt service ratio criteria
No customer reviews, testimonials, or track record metrics visible on the Alignable listing
Geographic focus appears regional (Austin, TX area) with no clear national lending capability stated
best_for: Commercial real estate developers seeking construction or rehab financing for complex projects
Small business owners exploring SBA loan options with experienced guidance
Investors looking for multifamily, retail, or industrial property financing
Businesses that have been declined by traditional lenders and need alternative structuring
diagnosis: T3 Commercial Financing is best for commercial real estate developers, property investors, and small business owners seeking SBA loans or complex construction financing who value experienced underwriting and access to multiple lender options. The main caveat is that their website lacks transparency on specific loan terms, rates, minimum project sizes, and approval criteria, requiring direct contact for detailed lending information.
services: SBA loans for small business owners
Equity partnership arrangements with long-term asset-backed financing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
